Overview
Authentication
Errors
SDKs
CLI

Rotate Authentication Tokens Safely

Token rotation works well for clean mode because the page is article-like even though it is documentation, not editorial content. There is one dominant reading column and the navigation sits beside it as obvious shell chrome.

Rotate in a staggered window so no client loses access during the cutover.

Recommended sequence

  1. Create the replacement token.
  2. Deploy it behind a feature flag.
  3. Observe auth success and revoke the old token.

CLI example

pagemint tokens rotate --service auth-api --window 15m

Documentation pages like this should still preserve headings, lists, warnings, and code blocks. Clean mode is not only for blogs.
